title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 33–36, this part focuses on Unknown person #29, Roger, Unknown person #30, Unknown person #31, Unknown person #32 as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: You two make a good team.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd like to see the both of you again...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Didn't you come here to take my head?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once the five of us gather again prop- e rely...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Let's head to the Grand Line!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Hey, Gramps!! If I chase them away...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Will you let me off the hook?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: a promise... and a new journey!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 16 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
